title: Dutchie Dispensary Scraper Input
description: Configuration options for the Dutchie dispensary scraper.

maxCityPages.title: Maximum City Pages
maxCityPages.description: Maximum number of city pages to scrape. Set to 0 to scrape all cities (~1,881 pages).

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent browser instances. Higher values = faster but more resource intensive.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max Request Retries
maxRequestRetries.description: Number of times to retry failed requests before giving up.

pageTimeout.title: Page Timeout (ms)
pageTimeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for page navigation.

delayBetweenRequests.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequests.description: Delay in milliseconds between processing requests. Helps avoid rate limiting.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Optional list of specific city page URLs to scrape. Leave empty to scrape all cities.

debugMode.title: Debug Mode
debugMode.description: Enable verbose logging for debugging purposes.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy configuration. Use residential proxies for better success rates.
